Find ‘your’ people on Hiki

Hiki is a friendship and dating app for the Autism, ADHD, and all Neurodivergent community. It is a place to feel safe, find friendship or love, and most importantly, to be yourself.

Find Love

Find a partner who understands and embraces every vibrant hue of your neurodivergent soul.

Find Friendship

Hiki is a sanctuary where supportive connections are forged through shared experiences and understanding.

Find Community

Discover a trove of understanding, connection, and acceptance. Where Neurodivergent adults can truly be themselves and thrive.
